title: Minecraft HD(64x) Better Leaves Add-On
description: This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD(64x) resource pack, giving leaf blocks a bushier look. Based on Motschen's Better Leaves resource pack.
body:
This is an add-on for the Minecraft HD(64x) resource pack, that gives leaf blocks a bushier look. Based on Motschen's Better Leaves resource pack, using the resource pack converter provided within that pack, with some further adjustments to better fit the Minecraft HD(64x) style.

Does NOT require Optifine or any special loaders to work
